channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Google Unveils Fitbit Air CAD Specs for Accessories
item.description: Google has released CAD drawings for the Fitbit Air, inviting third-party companies to create accessories. This move expands customization options for users.

item.title: Shokz Launches Enhanced Open Earbuds
item.description: Shokz has upgraded its open earbuds with improved sound quality and a lighter design. The new models include better noise reduction and a bone conduction microphone.

item.title: Corsair Unveils New High-End Power Supplies
item.description: Corsair showcased the AX1600i SHIFT and HX1000i SHIFT CRYSTAL power supplies at Computex 2026. Both feature a new SHIFT layout for improved connectivity.

item.title: LEGO Batman Game Launches on Switch 2
item.description: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will release on Nintendo Switch 2 on September 18, 2026. A new trailer has also been unveiled.

item.title: Top PlayStation Games of May Revealed
item.description: May's top-selling PlayStation games include FC 26 and new titles like 007 First Light. The report highlights cross-platform performance metrics.

item.title: Google Acquires Android App Code for AI Training
item.description: Google is reportedly purchasing Android app code from developers to enhance its AI models. This initiative aims to improve coding capabilities.

item.title: Gemini Introduces Free Thinking Modes
item.description: Gemini has made its new thinking modes available for free to all users. This update enhances user experience and functionality.

item.title: Pokémon Champions Launches on Mobile June 17
item.description: Pokémon Champions will be available on iOS and Android starting June 17, 2026. New in-game features and cross-platform functionality are confirmed.

item.title: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro Details Spark Interest
item.description: Leaked information about the iPhone 18 Pro reveals a variable aperture camera and a powerful 2-nm A20 Pro chip. The device also boasts a 5,200 mAh battery.

item.title: PS5 State of Play Breaks Viewership Records
item.description: The latest PS5 State of Play has become the most-watched episode ever, surpassing previous showcases. This indicates growing interest in PlayStation content.

item.title: Smart Wearable Tracks Fart Emissions
item.description: Researchers at the University of Maryland have developed a smart wearable to monitor fart emissions. The study aims to understand digestive health.

item.title: SwitchBot Acquires Nanoleaf for AI Expansion
item.description: SwitchBot's acquisition of Nanoleaf aims to enhance both companies' ambitions in AI and robotics. This partnership is expected to drive innovation in smart home technology.

item.title: Motorola Edge 2026 Competes with Pixel 11
item.description: Motorola's new Edge 2026 smartphone is positioned to rival Google's Pixel 11. It features advanced specifications and competitive pricing.

item.title: Mina the Hollower Achieves 300,000 Sales
item.description: Yacht Club Games reports that Mina the Hollower sold 300,000 copies in its launch weekend. The studio expresses confidence in its future after this success.

item.title: Rayman Origins Enhanced Edition Announced for Switch 2
item.description: Ubisoft officially announces Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition for Switch 2, alongside Rayman Legends Retold. Fans can expect improved graphics and gameplay.
